Records.authors: Piotr Bargiela, Fabrizio Caola, Andreas von Manteuffel, Lorenzo Tancredi
Records.description: The three-loop four-point massless Master Integrals are computed in planar, non-planar, and double-non-planar sectors. The result is given in terms of Harmonic Polylogarithms.

Records.authors: Gardi, Einan; Herzog, Franz; Jones, Stephen; Ma, Yao
Records.description: The crown / Landshoff diagram G_bullet_bullet: the simplest massless 2->2 three-loop graph (K_{3,3}, 8 massless propagators) featuring a pinch Landau singularity in parameter space in general kinematics. Evaluated numerically by dissecting the Newton polytope into 24 sectors; result checked against the analytic computation of arXiv:2008.xxxx (Henn:2020lye, Bargiela:2021wuy). Belongs to integral family 1(d) of Henn:2020lye. Also the leading source of the hidden (Landshoff) region in the on-shell wide-angle expansion and the Glauber hidden region in the Regge limit.
